title: [SG Stock] Portable Baby Bottle Cleaning Brush Set With Drying Rack And Travel Storage Box
detail_text: The Ultimate Baby Bottle Cleaning Companion – Compact, Hygienic & Travel-Friendly! Say goodbye to messy bottle cleaning on the go! Our Multi-Functional Foldable Bottle Brush & Drain Rack Set is designed for busy parents who need a quick, hygienic, and space-saving solution. ✅ 360° Deep Cleaning – Soft yet durable bristles for a thorough clean! ✅ Foldable Drain Rack – Dries bottles & accessories hygienically. ✅ Compact & Travel-Friendly – Perfect for home or on-the-go! ✅ BPA-Free & Safe – Made from high-quality, baby-safe materials. 💖 Keep Your Baby’s Bottles Sparkling Clean – Anytime, Anywhere! Order Now & Make Bottle Cleaning Effortless! ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Drying Rack ●This foldable travel bottle drying rack is small but has enough space for lots of baby bottles, teats, pacifiers, pump parts, etc ● Compact Size for Space Saving: 25 x 14 x 5 cm (approx) - Folding size ● Total 12 drying sticks ● Large capacity for on-the-go
detail_html:
The Ultimate Baby Bottle Cleaning Companion – Compact, Hygienic & Travel-Friendly!

Say goodbye to messy bottle cleaning on the go! Our Multi-Functional Foldable Bottle Brush & Drain Rack Set is designed for busy parents who need a quick, hygienic, and space-saving solution.

✅ 360° Deep Cleaning – Soft yet durable bristles for a thorough clean!

✅ Foldable Drain Rack – Dries bottles & accessories hygienically.

✅ Compact & Travel-Friendly – Perfect for home or on-the-go!

✅ BPA-Free & Safe – Made from high-quality, baby-safe materials.

💖 Keep Your Baby’s Bottles Sparkling Clean – Anytime, Anywhere!

 Order Now & Make Bottle Cleaning Effortless! 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Drying Rack

●This foldable travel bottle drying rack is small but has enough space for lots of baby bottles, teats, pacifiers, pump parts, etc

● Compact Size for Space Saving: 25 x 14 x 5 cm (approx) - Folding size

● Total 12 drying sticks

● Large capacity for on-the-go

product.desc:
The Ultimate Baby Bottle Cleaning Companion – Compact, Hygienic & Travel-Friendly!

Say goodbye to messy bottle cleaning on the go! Our Multi-Functional Foldable Bottle Brush & Drain Rack Set is designed for busy parents who need a quick, hygienic, and space-saving solution.

✅ 360° Deep Cleaning – Soft yet durable bristles for a thorough clean!

✅ Foldable Drain Rack – Dries bottles & accessories hygienically.

✅ Compact & Travel-Friendly – Perfect for home or on-the-go!

✅ BPA-Free & Safe – Made from high-quality, baby-safe materials.

💖 Keep Your Baby’s Bottles Sparkling Clean – Anytime, Anywhere!

 Order Now & Make Bottle Cleaning Effortless! 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Drying Rack

●This foldable travel bottle drying rack is small but has enough space for lots of baby bottles, teats, pacifiers, pump parts, etc

● Compact Size for Space Saving: 25 x 14 x 5 cm (approx) - Folding size

● Total 12 drying sticks

● Large capacity for on-the-go

title: 3 In 1 Bottle Gap Cleaner Brush Cup Crevice Cleaning Brush Silicone Bottle Cup-Holder Cleaner for Home Kitchen Cleaning Accessories
detail_text: Multipurpose Bottle Gap Cleaner Brush Crevice Cleaning Brush Silicone Bottle Cup-Holder Cleaner for Home Kitchen Cleaning Tools Description: 【3 in 1 Bottle Cleaning Brush】Our 3 in 1 cleaning brush is a new style, respectively, contains three blue brushes, white brushes, green brushes, a brush three uses, to bring you a new experience in cup cleaning. 【Quality Material】These portable bottle cleaning brushes are made of high-quality materials, stainless steel, strong and wearable, washable and safe, not easy to break, and can withstand 80 degrees Celsius, which can serve you for a long time. 【Easy to Clean and Use】The multipurpose bottle gap cleaner brush with its own hanging hole, after cleaning can be hung to drain, does not take up space and can help you to clean well corners and crevices of the nipple, vacuum cup and more, do not harm your bottles, bringing you a nice use experience. 【Multi-Purpose】Our cup cleaner brush head can rotate 360 degrees in one direction (counterclockwise rotation only), with U-shaped silicone cupping brush, stranded slit brush, stiff bristle corner brush three different functions of the brush head, suitable for cleaning different objects, bottle lid, wine glass cap, tea cups, milk bottles, ice grids, molds, peelers, etc. Feature: Type : brush Material: Silicone, nylon, stainless steel, ABS, PP, PET Color: White/Blue/Green Size: 11.4x3.4x1.6cm/4.49x1.34x0.63in Package Includes: 1 x brush Note: 1.Due to manual measurements, please allow slight measurement deviations. 2.Due to the different display and lighting effects, the actual color of the item may be slightly different from the color displayed in the picture.
detail_html:
Multipurpose Bottle Gap Cleaner Brush Crevice Cleaning Brush Silicone Bottle Cup-Holder Cleaner for Home Kitchen Cleaning Tools


Description:
【3 in 1 Bottle Cleaning Brush】Our 3 in 1 cleaning brush is a new style, respectively, contains three blue brushes, white brushes, green brushes, a brush three uses, to bring you a new experience in cup cleaning.
【Quality Material】These portable bottle cleaning brushes are made of high-quality materials, stainless steel, strong and wearable, washable and safe, not easy to break, and can withstand 80 degrees Celsius, which can serve you for a long time.
【Easy to Clean and Use】The multipurpose bottle gap cleaner brush with its own hanging hole, after cleaning can be hung to drain, does not take up space and can help you to clean well corners and crevices of the nipple, vacuum cup and more, do not harm your bottles, bringing you a nice use experience.
【Multi-Purpose】Our cup cleaner brush head can rotate 360 degrees in one direction (counterclockwise rotation only), with U-shaped silicone cupping brush, stranded slit brush, stiff bristle corner brush three different functions of the brush head, suitable for cleaning different objects, bottle lid, wine glass cap, tea cups, milk bottles, ice grids, molds, peelers, etc.

Feature:
Type : brush
Material: Silicone, nylon, stainless steel, ABS, PP, PET
Color: White/Blue/Green
Size: 11.4x3.4x1.6cm/4.49x1.34x0.63in

Package Includes:

1 x brush

Note:
1.Due to manual measurements, please allow slight measurement deviations.
2.Due to the different display and lighting effects, the actual color of the item may be slightly different from the color displayed in the picture.

title: Dr Brown's Bottle Cleaning Brush (8 Variations)
detail_text: Dr. Brown’s Bottle Cleaning Brushes are designed to make baby bottle cleaning easier, with options for everyday bottle scrubbing, gentle scratch-free cleaning, detailed vent cleaning, straw and spout cleaning, and deluxe deep cleaning. Suitable for Dr. Brown’s standard and wide-neck Natural Flow baby bottles, as well as bottle accessories, nipples, sippy cups, straws, and pump parts. • Designed for cleaning baby bottles, nipples, vents, straws, spouts, pump parts, cups, and accessories, depending on the brush type • Helps remove milk residue, formula build-up, and debris from hard-to-reach areas • Options available for general bottle cleaning, soft-touch cleaning, vent cleaning, silicone cleaning, and deluxe cleaning • No-slip or ergonomic handles on selected brush types • Storage clip, suction base, or upright-standing design on selected brush types • Scratch-free bristles or silicone bristles on selected brush types • Dishwasher safe on selected brush types • BPA free on selected brush types Available Options: Dr. Brown’s Bottle Cleaning Brush A classic bottle brush with a combination sponge and bristle head for thorough bottle cleaning. The grooved no-slip handle includes a ridged nipple cleaner at the base, while the suction storage clip keeps the brush conveniently near the sink. Dr. Brown’s Soft Touch Bottle Brush Designed with soft bristles that clean bottles without scratching. This brush is metal-free, sterilizer safe, top-rack dishwasher safe, and includes a suction clip for hygienic upright storage. Dr. Brown’s Natural Flow Cleaning Brush 4-Pack Small cleaning brushes designed especially for Dr. Brown’s vent inserts and vent reservoirs. Helps keep the internal vent system clean and clear of blockages. Dr. Brown’s Deluxe Bottle Brush A sturdy bottle brush with angled bristles to reach corners and reduce splashing during cleaning. Features an ergonomic soft-grip handle, ridged nipple cleaner, suction storage clip, and top-rack dishwasher-safe design. Dr. Brown’s Silicone Cleaning Brush Set A 3-piece silicone brush set designed to clean bottles, sippy cups, pump parts, straws, nipples, spouts, and other hard-to-reach areas. The set includes a long-handled bottle brush, a nipple and spout cleaner, and a straw cleaning brush. Soft yet durable silicone bristles clean without scratching, while the upright-standing design allows for convenient and hygienic storage.
detail_html:
Dr. Brown’s Bottle Cleaning Brushes are designed to make baby bottle cleaning easier, with options for everyday bottle scrubbing, gentle scratch-free cleaning, detailed vent cleaning, straw and spout cleaning, and deluxe deep cleaning. Suitable for Dr. Brown’s standard and wide-neck Natural Flow baby bottles, as well as bottle accessories, nipples, sippy cups, straws, and pump parts.

• Designed for cleaning baby bottles, nipples, vents, straws, spouts, pump parts, cups, and accessories, depending on the brush type

• Helps remove milk residue, formula build-up, and debris from hard-to-reach areas

• Options available for general bottle cleaning, soft-touch cleaning, vent cleaning, silicone cleaning, and deluxe cleaning

• No-slip or ergonomic handles on selected brush types

• Storage clip, suction base, or upright-standing design on selected brush types

• Scratch-free bristles or silicone bristles on selected brush types

• Dishwasher safe on selected brush types

• BPA free on selected brush types

Available Options:

Dr. Brown’s Bottle Cleaning Brush

A classic bottle brush with a combination sponge and bristle head for thorough bottle cleaning. The grooved no-slip handle includes a ridged nipple cleaner at the base, while the suction storage clip keeps the brush conveniently near the sink.

Dr. Brown’s Soft Touch Bottle Brush

Designed with soft bristles that clean bottles without scratching. This brush is metal-free, sterilizer safe, top-rack dishwasher safe, and includes a suction clip for hygienic upright storage.

Dr. Brown’s Natural Flow Cleaning Brush 4-Pack

Small cleaning brushes designed especially for Dr. Brown’s vent inserts and vent reservoirs. Helps keep the internal vent system clean and clear of blockages.

Dr. Brown’s Deluxe Bottle Brush

A sturdy bottle brush with angled bristles to reach corners and reduce splashing during cleaning. Features an ergonomic soft-grip handle, ridged nipple cleaner, suction storage clip, and top-rack dishwasher-safe design.

Dr. Brown’s Silicone Cleaning Brush Set

A 3-piece silicone brush set designed to clean bottles, sippy cups, pump parts, straws, nipples, spouts, and other hard-to-reach areas. The set includes a long-handled bottle brush, a nipple and spout cleaner, and a straw cleaning brush. Soft yet durable silicone bristles clean without scratching, while the upright-standing design allows for convenient and hygienic storage.

product.highlights:
• Dr Brown's Bottle Cleaning Brushes 
  • Bottle Cleaning Brush:
  • For use with all standard and wide-neck Dr. Brown's Natural Flow baby bottles
  • Grooved, no-slip handle and a combination sponge and bristle brush head for thorough, easy cleaning of bottles
  • Features chevron channels in the base designed specifically to clean nipples with ease

  • Natural Flow Cleaning Brush (4pk) clean all natural flow baby bottles, particularly the vent parts.

page_json.description: Dr Brown s. Drying Rack for Baby Bottles: Dishwasher-safe drying rack for baby bottles. Water Bottle Brush Cleaner: Use a brush to clean the inside of the bottle. Long Bottle Cleaner Brush: Use this bottle brush to clean your glass bottle and keep it clean. Baby Milk Bottle Cleaner: Keep your milk bottle clean and hygienic. Baby Milk Bottle Brush: Our bottle cleaning brush is designed to clean the hardest stains of your baby's bottle. Dr Brown's Bottle Cleaning Brushes. Bottle Cleaning Brush: For use with all standard and wide-neck Dr. Brown's Natural Flow baby bottles. Grooved, no-slip handle and a combination sponge and bristle brush head for thorough, easy cleaning of bottles. Features chevron channels in the base designed specifically to clean nipples with ease. Soft Touch Bottle Brush. Soft bristles won't scratch bottles Sterilizer safe Grooved no-slip handle for easy grip. Natural Flow Cleaning Brush 4pk clean all natural flow baby bottles, particularly the vent parts

title: Lieto | Mini nipple brush bottle cleaning brush 2P
detail_text: High-Quality Material Constructed from high-quality materials, this brush is durable and designed to last through frequent use. Versatile Cleaning Tool This Lieto mini nipple brush is a versatile cleaning tool, perfect for bottle cleaning and disinfection. Convenient Packaging The product comes in a convenient 2-pack, providing you with two brushes for your cleaning needs. Color Variety Available in oatmeal color, this brush adds a touch of sophistication to your kitchen essentials. Easy to Use With its user-friendly design, this brush is easy to use, making it suitable for both new and experienced parents.

title: 10pcs Bottle Cleaning Brushes Multifunctional Reusable Straw Cleaning Brush For Narrow Neck Bottles Cups
detail_text: Features: Comprehensive Cleaning Set: This set includes 10 different brushes to tackle all your cleaning needs, from bottles to straws and everything in between. Durable Material: Made of high-quality stainless steel, these brushes are built to last and won't rust or break easily. Soft Bristles: The soft bristles on these brushes are gentle enough to use on delicate surfaces, yet tough enough to scrub away dirt and grime. Versatile: Use these brushes to clean a variety of items, including bottles, glasses, straws, and even small appliances. Easy to Store: The included storage container keeps your brushes organized and within easy reach. Specifications: Material: Nylon bristles, Stainless steel Color: Black,Transparent White Package Includes: 10 x Nylon Tube Brushes Straw Set. Notice: 1. Please allow 2-3% error due to manual measurement. 2. The colors may have different as the difference display, please understand.
detail_html:
Features:
  • Comprehensive Cleaning Set: This set includes 10 different brushes to tackle all your cleaning needs, from bottles to straws and everything in between.
  • Durable Material: Made of high-quality stainless steel, these brushes are built to last and won't rust or break easily.
  • Soft Bristles: The soft bristles on these brushes are gentle enough to use on delicate surfaces, yet tough enough to scrub away dirt and grime.
  • Versatile: Use these brushes to clean a variety of items, including bottles, glasses, straws, and even small appliances.
  • Easy to Store: The included storage container keeps your brushes organized and within easy reach.

aiTexts: The Silicone Bottle Cleaning Brush is an essential tool for parents and caregivers.
Designed for thorough cleaning, it features a 360-degree scrubber that easily reaches all areas of bottles, pacifiers, and straws.
Its soft silicone bristles are gentle yet effective, ensuring no scratches or damage to delicate surfaces.
Perfect for use in kitchens and nurseries, this brush promotes hygiene and safety for your little ones.
Compact and easy to handle, it simplifies the cleaning process, making it a must-have for busy households.

detail_text: Features： 【Multi-Functional Cleaning Angle】: Our Foldable cup brush's innovative 90° angled brush head is designed to reach the bottom and corners of cups with ease. This unique feature ensures a thorough clean every time, even in hard-to-reach areas. 【Gentle and Effective】: The brush's soft and long bristles clean effectively without leaving scratches or marks. This ensures your cups and containers stay in pristine condition after each use. 【Hygienic Storage】: The brush has a hanging function for convenient hanging storage. It prevents the growth of bacteria and ensures more hygienic cleaning tools. 【Extended Handle】: The cleaning brush’s extended PP handle provides a comfortable grip, making it easier to clean various types of cups and containers. 【Practical and Durable】: This cup brush is made of high-quality PP handle and TPE bristles, which is both practical and durable. The materials selected are strong and wear-resistant to ensure long-term use. Notes： Please allow 1-3cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement. Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures,thanks for understanding.

Multi-Functional Cleaning Angle: Our Foldable cup brush's innovative 90° angled brush head is designed to reach the bottom and corners of cups with ease. This unique feature ensures a thorough clean every time, even in hard-to-reach areas. Gentle and Effective: The brush's soft and long bristles clean effectively without leaving scratches or marks. This ensures your cups and containers stay in pristine condition after each use. Hygienic Storage: The brush has a hanging function for convenient hanging storage. It prevents the growth of bacteria and ensures more hygienic cleaning tools. Extended Handle: The cleaning brush s extended PP handle provides a comfortable grip, making it easier to clean various types of cups and containers. title: YOULE | Multi-functional Bottle Cleaning Brush
detail_text: Multi-functional Design This cup brush features a long handle and multi-functional design, making it easy to clean hard-to-reach areas of your water bottle or cup. Home Use Ideal for home use, this brush effectively removes stubborn stains and dirt, keeping your cups hygienic and clean. Insulation Cap Compatibility Designed to fit various insulated cups, this brush ensures thorough cleaning while maintaining the cup's insulation properties. Durable Material Made from durable materials, this brush withstands frequent use, ensuring long-lasting performance. Portable Size Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to clean your cups anytime, anywhere.
detail_html:
Multi-functional Design



This cup brush features a long handle and multi-functional design, making it easy to clean hard-to-reach areas of your water bottle or cup.






Home Use



Ideal for home use, this brush effectively removes stubborn stains and dirt, keeping your cups hygienic and clean.






Insulation Cap Compatibility



Designed to fit various insulated cups, this brush ensures thorough cleaning while maintaining the cup's insulation properties.






Durable Material



Made from durable materials, this brush withstands frequent use, ensuring long-lasting performance.






Portable Size



Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to clean your cups anytime, anywhere.

detail_blocks.text: Multi-functional Design This cup brush features a long handle and multi-functional design, making it easy to clean hard-to-reach areas of your water bottle or cup. Home Use Ideal for home use, this brush effectively removes stubborn stains and dirt, keeping your cups hygienic and clean. Insulation Cap Compatibility Designed to fit various insulated cups, this brush ensures thorough cleaning while maintaining the cup's insulation properties. Durable Material Made from durable materials, this brush withstands frequent use, ensuring long-lasting performance. Portable Size Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to clean your cups anytime, anywhere.

product.desc:
Multi-functional Design



This cup brush features a long handle and multi-functional design, making it easy to clean hard-to-reach areas of your water bottle or cup.






Home Use



Ideal for home use, this brush effectively removes stubborn stains and dirt, keeping your cups hygienic and clean.






Insulation Cap Compatibility



Designed to fit various insulated cups, this brush ensures thorough cleaning while maintaining the cup's insulation properties.






Durable Material



Made from durable materials, this brush withstands frequent use, ensuring long-lasting performance.






Portable Size



Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to clean your cups anytime, anywhere.

detail_text: Name:Bottle Brush Package: 1 Pcs* Bottle Brush Color:Green Size:40 cm Material:Nylon Description: A 40CM long bottle brush can easily reach the bottom and clean the entire interior area 20mm 304 and 12cm stainless steel wire durable flexible bristles that are durable but flexible to reach even the hardest-to-reach internal crevices 3 Add additional bristles to the end of the brush to oughly clean the bottom of the bottle Sturdy, sturdy handles allow you to grip and keep in use for quick and easy cleaning. Hanging holes for easy storage keep brushes dry and clean Add additional bristles to the end of the brush to oughly clean the bottom of the bottle The versatile long brush is thin and fits all narrow-necked beers, wine bottles, kombucha bottles, kefir bottles, brewing bottles, thermos bottles, narrow-necked barrels, growlers and many hummingbird feeding mouths Features: 1, 2PCS 40cm long handles and soft, flexible brushes are designed for areas that need cleaning but are hard to reach 2, Material: high quality nylon bristles, 20mm 304 stainless steel wire, high quality plastic handle 3, the compact yet powerful head cleans every contour, and the longer handle gives you more weight and better reach 4, when you have a lot of bottles to clean before you start your next batch of beer, wine, tea, or kombucha, you'll be glad the brush is easy to maintain and sturdy 5, long bottle brush, suitable for your beer bottle, bottle, pitcher, decanter, glass jar, sports bottle, water bottle, thermos bottle, growler, feeder, etc
detail_html:
Name:Bottle Brush

Package: 1 Pcs* Bottle Brush

Color:Green

Size:40 cm

Material:Nylon


Description:

A 40CM long bottle brush can easily reach the bottom and clean the entire interior area

20mm 304 and 12cm stainless steel wire durable flexible bristles that are durable but flexible to reach even the hardest-to-reach internal crevices 3 Add additional bristles to the end of the brush to oughly clean the bottom of the bottle

Sturdy, sturdy handles allow you to grip and keep in use for quick and easy cleaning. Hanging holes for easy storage keep brushes dry and clean

Add additional bristles to the end of the brush to oughly clean the bottom of the bottle

The versatile long brush is thin and fits all narrow-necked beers, wine bottles, kombucha bottles, kefir bottles, brewing bottles, thermos bottles, narrow-necked barrels, growlers and many hummingbird feeding mouths

Features:

1, 2PCS 40cm long handles and soft, flexible brushes are designed for areas that need cleaning but are hard to reach

2, Material: high quality nylon bristles, 20mm 304 stainless steel wire, high quality plastic handle

3, the compact yet powerful head cleans every contour, and the longer handle gives you more weight and better reach

4, when you have a lot of bottles to clean before you start your next batch of beer, wine, tea, or kombucha, you'll be glad the brush is easy to maintain and sturdy

5, long bottle brush, suitable for your beer bottle, bottle, pitcher, decanter, glass jar, sports bottle, water bottle, thermos bottle, growler, feeder, etc

title: Silicone Milk Bottle Brush Cup Scrubber Glass Cleaner Long Handle Drink Bottle Clean Brush Kitchen Cleaning Tool
detail_text: Silicone Material Crafted from high-quality silicone, this milk bottle brush is durable and safe for cleaning glass and silicone surfaces. Long Handle Design The long handle design allows for easy reach into tight spaces, ensuring thorough cleaning of your milk bottles and kitchen utensils. Specialty Cleaning Tool As a specialty cleaning tool, it's perfect for maintaining the cleanliness of your milk bottles and other kitchenware. Lightweight and Portable Its lightweight and portable design makes it easy to store and use, perfect for everyday cleaning tasks. Efficient Cleaner This brush cup scrubber glass cleaner removes stubborn stains and dirt with ease, saving you time and effort in your cleaning routine. Versatile Use Not just for milk bottles, this brush is also great for cleaning other glassware, making it a versatile addition to your kitchen cleaning tools.
detail_html:
Silicone Material

Crafted from high-quality silicone, this milk bottle brush is durable and safe for cleaning glass and silicone surfaces.

Long Handle Design
